Image Info

Upload any image to instantly see its dimensions, file size, format and aspect ratio.

Drop your image here

Upload any image to see its dimensions and details.

🔒 Your files never leave your device.
Advertisement

How to find image dimensions

Upload your image and all details appear instantly. Width, height, file size, format and aspect ratio in one click.

What information does it show?

Width and height in pixels, file size, image format, aspect ratio, megapixels and orientation.

Is it safe?

Your image never leaves your device. Everything runs locally in your browser.

⚡ PixMidas

Free browser-based tools. No login required. Runs locally in your browser.
